titleStmt.title: SII 30.98: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 98. (A.R. No. 175 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District. Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple-on the east wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 4, day 352: 1016 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the rearrangement of the expenses for the celebrations of new moon days (amavāsya) to the deities of Tirumukkūḍal by the assembly of Madhurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, an independent village in Jayaṅkoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is stated that originally the provision was made for the supply of 120 kāḍi of paddy by the ūrār for Puraṭṭāsi festival, 150 kāḍi of paddy by Rājārāja Vādyamārāyaṉ for Aipasi festival and 120 kāḍi by the ūrār of Vaippūr out of the yield from the lands situated in Piṇāyūr near Arumpuliyūr which was called “Tiruviḻā chatiram”. It is further stated that the amavāsya festival includes procession, sacred bath in the river (tīrtāmāḍal) and sacred bath in the temple (tirumañjanam). The provisions for the offerings to Tirumukkūḍal Āḻvār, Garuḍadēvar, Sēnāpathi by Sēnāpati and Chakkarattāḻvār were specified such as oil for lamp, various aromatic items for sacred bath and also food offerings for four persons who were the palanquin bearers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu nāṉkāvatu
nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaympattiraṇṭu cayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu taniyūr śrī maturān=takaccaturrvveti
maṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom nam tirumukkūṭal Āḻvār tiruviḻāc catiramāṉa Arumpuliyūrppā
l piṇāyūr Eṭṭuppāṭakamum IyvūrārRead- ivvūrārUḻutu muṉ puraṭṭātit tirunāḷukku Aṭṭivan=ta
nellu nūṟṟirupatiṉ kāṭiyum rājarājavādyamahārājar Ēṟṟaṭaiyāl Ayppacit tiruṉāḷai
kku Aṭṭakkaṭava nellu nūṟṟaiympatiṉ kāṭiyum Atikārikaḷ vaippūravar Ēṟṟaṭaiyāl ne
llu nūṟṟirupatiṉ kāṭiyum Āka Iccatura Ivvūrār Uḻutu śanrādittavaṟ vāṭākkaṭaṉ Āṭṭāṇ
ṭutoṟum tirumuṟṟatte koṭuvaṉtaṭṭakkaṭṭava nellu muṉṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟukkāṭiyilum
muṉ puraṭṭātit tirunāḷaikku Aṭṭakkaṭavanellu nūṟṟirupatiṉ kāṭiyum Aippacit tirunāḷaikku
muṉ tivan=tappaṭiRead- nivantappaṭiAṭṭakkaṭava nellu nūṟṟaiympatiṉ kāṭiyum nīkki niṉṟa nellu nūṟṟirupati
ṉ kāṭiyuṅkoṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu Amāvāsyaiyu n=tiruviḻā veḻuntaruḷat tirtdhamāṭuvatarkku
nivantam paṇṇukaveṉṟu Atikārikaḷ cempaṅkuṭaiyārum vaippūr kiḻavarum Ēva nīkki niṉṟa
nellu nūṟṟirupatiṉ kāṭiyuṅ koṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu Amāvāśyaiyun tiruviḻāveḻuntaruḷi tīrtdha
māṭit tirumañcaṇam ceyvataṟku Amāvāśyai Oṉṟiṉukku Āḻvār Eḻuntaruḷum potu Amu
tu ceytaruḷa Arici nāṉāḻiyuṅ karuddhatevarkku yarici Irunāḻiyum senāpatiyārkku Arici Irunā
ḻiyuñ cakkaradevarkku Arici Irunāḻiyum balikku Arici Irunāḻiyu mañcuṇañ ceytāl Amutu
ceytaruḷa Arici kuṟuṇiyum Āka Arici patakku nāṉāḻikku nellu Aṟukāl Irunāḻiyum Āḻvā
rkkum Idevarkaḷukkuṅ kaṟiyamutukku nellu Aṟunāḻiyum Āḻvārkkum Idevarkaḷukkum
Urikku nellup patakkum Āḻvārkkum Idevarkaḷukkut tayiramutu muṉṉāḻikku nellu Aṟunā
ḻiyum Āḻvārkkum Idevarkaḷukkum Aṭaikkāy Amutukkup pākkup patināṟum veṟṟilai Eṇpatukkum ne
llu nāṉāḻiyum Eḻun=taruḷum poḻtu tiruppaḷḷiccivikai kāvuvār nālvarkkup perāl nellu nāṉāḻi
Āka nelluppatakkum Eḻuntaruḷum potaikkut tirumañcaṉattukkum Ākat tiruviḷakkeṇṇai nāḻikku nel
lu Oru kāṭiyum snapana kalaśattaṭikkiḻ Aṭṭa nellup patakkuṅ kalacañcuṟṟa ṉūlukku nellu nāṉāḻiyum Ā
ṭiyaruḷa ney nāṉāḻi Uḻakkiṉukku nellu nāṟkāṭi kuṭṭaiyum Āṭiyaruḷat tayir nāṉāḻi Urikku nelluk kuṟu
ṇi Orunāḻiyum pāl nāṉāḻi Urikku nelluk kuṟuṇi Oru nāḻiyun tiruccuṇṇattukku muḷimañcaḷ Irunā
ḻikku nelluppatakkum Āka Oru Amāvāsaikku nellup patiṉkāṭi Ākap paṉṉiraṇṭu Amāvāśyaikku
nellu ṉūṟṟirupatiṉkāṭiyuṅ koṇṭu devarkaṉmikaḷe śantrādittavaṟ ceyyakkaṭavarkaḷāka śilālekhai ce
ytu kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom paṇiyāṟ poṉṉampalattiṉ ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
